content: I've been driving trucks for over 20 years, but I'm thinking of retiring soon. I'm 64 and I feel like it's time to slow down.
That's understandable, Rowan. Driving trucks can be physically demanding. What do you plan to do in retirement?
I'm not sure yet. I've been training for a triathlon next month, so that's been keeping me busy. I'm also thinking of starting a beekeeping hobby.
That's great! Staying active is important, especially as we age. Beekeeping is a fascinating hobby. Have you considered what kind of bees you'd like to keep?
I'm thinking of starting with a few honey bee colonies. I've heard they're relatively easy to care for.
That's true. Honey bees are a great choice for beginners. Have you thought about where you'll keep your bee colonies?
I have a big backyard in my house in Denver, so I'm thinking of setting up my apiary there. I'm also planning a trip to Japan next year to learn more about Japanese cuisine.
Denver is a beautiful city. Japan is also a great destination. What inspired you to learn more about Japanese cuisine?
I've always loved the food and culture of Japan. I think it would be a great way to explore a new hobby and meet new people.
That's a great attitude to have. Exploring new hobbies and interests can be very rewarding. Have you thought about how you'll balance your beekeeping hobby with your triathlon training?
I'm not sure yet. I'll have to figure it out as I go. I'm just taking things one day at a time.
That's a good approach. It's always better to take things one step at a time. Do you have any other hobbies or interests that you're passionate about?
I'm also interested in speedcubing. I've been trying to solve the Rubik's Cube in under 1 minute.
That's impressive! Speedcubing is a challenging hobby. Have you thought about competing in any speedcubing competitions?
I'm not sure yet. I'll have to see how my skills develop. I'm just having fun with it for now.
That's the right attitude to have. It's always important to enjoy the process and not just focus on the end goal.
Exactly. I'm just trying to stay active and engaged in my retirement.
That's great to hear. Staying active and engaged is key to a happy and healthy retirement.
